creator: naddy@FreeBSD.org
text:
The openntpd port does require security/libressl.

openntpd itself should build fine with libressl-devel, but obviously not if you use the port.

As I explained, there is no way to make the port depend on (libressl OR libressl-devel).

Again:  You will either have to arrange things so that you have only security/libressl installed, or you can disable the RESSL option in the openntpd port and not use the constraints feature.
